known_contradictions.claim_a: Keoghan is naturally charismatic and comfortable in his own skin
known_contradictions.claim_b: In Irish interviews, he discusses childhood insecurity and how acting was an escape from social anxiety
known_contradictions.sources: Late Late Show vs. Kimmel appearance

known_contradictions.claim_a: He specializes in menacing, unhinged characters
known_contradictions.claim_b: Banshees performance revealed heartbreaking vulnerability — his range may be wider than the 'creepy' typecasting suggests
known_contradictions.sources: Sacred Deer vs. Banshees character analysis
